access_token.description: WorkflowMax API access token, sent as a Bearer token on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: WorkflowMax API base URL. Defaults to the production endpoint; override for test proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read; matches legacy's default of 1 page when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
